name: BhartERP MSME 45-Day Payment Alert
script:
# MSME 45-day payment rule alert # Runs daily — alerts about Purchase Invoices from MSME suppliers due in 3 days import frappe from frappe.utils import today, add_days, date_diff today_date = today() warning_date = add_days(today_date, 3) msme_suppliers = frappe.db.get_all( 'Supplier', filters={'custom_msme_reg_no': ['!=', '']}, fields=['name'] ) if not msme_suppliers: pass else: msme_names = [s.name for s in msme_suppliers] due_bills = frappe.db.get_all( 'Purchase Invoice', filters={ 'supplier': ['in', msme_names], 'docstatus': 1, 'outstanding_amount': ['>', 0], 'custom_msme_due_date': ['<=', warning_date], 'custom_msme_due_date': ['>=', today_date], }, fields=['name','supplier','supplier_name','grand_total', 'outstanding_amount','custom_msme_due_date'] ) if due_bills: accounts_users = frappe.db.get_all( 'Has Role', filters={'role': 'Accounts User', 'parenttype': 'User'}, fields=['parent'] ) rows = ''.join( f'{b.name}{b.supplier_name}' f'₹{b.outstanding_amount:,.2f}' f'{b.custom_msme_due_date}' for b in due_bills ) for user in accounts_users: try: frappe.sendmail( recipients=[user.parent], subject=f'⚠ BhartERP: {len(due_bills)} MSME Bills Due Soon', message=f'''

MSME 45-Day Payment Rule Alert

The following MSME supplier invoices are due within 3 days. Late payment violates the MSME 45-day rule.

{rows}
InvoiceSupplierOutstandingDue Date

— BhartERP · Paisape Techfin

''' ) except Exception: pass
